## Pull Request Checklist | 提交前检查清单

<!-- Please check all the boxes that apply to your change. | 请勾选适用的选项。 -->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING guidelines | 我已阅读贡献指南
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project | 我的代码符合项目的风格指南
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code | 我已对自己的代码进行了自我审查
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas | 我已对难以理解的代码添加了注释
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation | 我已对文档进行了相应的更改
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings | 我的更改没有产生新的警告
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works | 我已添加测试证明我的修复有效或功能正常
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes | 新的和现有的单元测试在我的更改下在本地通过
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules | 任何依赖的更改已在下游模块中合并和发布

---

## Type of Change | 更改类型

<!-- What type of change does this PR introduce? | 此 PR 引入了什么类型的更改？-->

- [ ] Bug Fix | 漏洞修复
- [ ] New Feature | 新功能
- [ ] Breaking Change | 破坏性更改
- [ ] Documentation Update | 文档更新
- [ ] Refactoring | 重构
- [ ] Performance Improvement | 性能改进
- [ ] Other | 其他

---

## Description | 描述

<!-- Please describe your changes in detail. | 请详细描述您的更改。 -->

### English
<!-- Describe what this PR does, why it's needed, and any alternatives considered. -->

### 中文
<!-- 描述这个 PR 做了什么，为什么需要它，以及考虑过的任何替代方案。 -->

---

## Related Issue(s) | 相关 Issue

<!-- Please link to any related issues here. | 请在此处链接任何相关的 issue。-->

Closes # <!-- issue number -->
Related to # <!-- issue number(s) -->

---

## How Has This Been Tested? | 测试情况

<!-- Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. | 请描述您运行的测试以验证您的更改。 -->

### Test Configuration | 测试配置

- Plugin Version: <!-- e.g., 1.0.4-SNAPSHOT
- Server Version: <!-- e.g., Paper 1.21.1
- Java Version: <!-- e.g., Java 21

### Tested Scenarios | 测试场景

<!-- What did you test? How did you test it? | 您测试了什么？如何测试的？ -->

---

## Screenshots (if applicable) | 截图（如果适用）

<!-- Add screenshots to help explain your changes. | 添加截图以帮助解释您的更改。 -->

## Additional Notes | 其他说明
